@graph.title: Waves
@graph.description: Identifiers for experimental and natural wave phenomena.
@graph.creator: Isabella Ruiz

@graph.definition: Exerting an influence or producing a change or effect. An active measurement is one which produces a transmission or excitation as a part of the measurement cycle.
Movement or effect produced by outside influence. A passive measurement is one which does not produce a transmission or excitation as a part of the measurement cycle.
